summary: Added Credibility strip and Work index with scroll-triggered section beats (title then staggered reveals). Gated Lenis and scroll motion on prefers-reduced-motion. Project data in app/data/projects.ts. Branch pushed; PR creation blocked by token scope.

outputs.data_contract: ProjectItem in app/data/projects.ts: id, title, description, repoUrl, imageSrc, imageAlt, optional caseTeaser
outputs.motion_hooks: data-scroll-beat on section, data-scroll-section-title on heading, data-scroll-reveal on staggered nodes
